---
title: "Lesson 4:  The Central Limit Theorem"
subtitle: "Statistical Estimation for Data Science and AI"
---

::: {.column-margin}
{{< video 01_the-central-limit-theorem.mp4 >}}

[Transcript](01_the-central-limit-theorem.en.txt)

:::

## Slides

## Reflection
